{{Expand}}

{{Infobox icon
| name = Hunger Icon
| introduced = cradle-10-reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Hunger Icon]] is an image of a widened mouth full of sharpened fangs that forms in the sky.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c24">''Reaper'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Icons]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
